problem.title: BALM2 on KITTI Raw drive 0009 full sequence (443 frames, urban)
problem.question: How does BALM2 perform on the KITTI Raw drive 0009 full sequence (443 frames, urban)?

variants.label: Fast
variants.intent: Reduce feature density and bundle-adjustment effort for a lighter mapping window.

variants.label: Dense
variants.intent: Increase feature density and keep a slightly larger optimization window for a more exhaustive mapping solve without the previous runtime blow-up.
